description: The engineering division needs Peak Ground Velocity (PGV) measurements for the M7.5 Noto Peninsula earthquake (2024-01-01) to assess potential structural damage. Reconfigure the SeisComP system to compute PGV amplitudes and reprocess the Noto Peninsula earthquake event using the archived waveforms at sdsarchive:///home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive and the database at mysql://sysop:sysop@localhost/seiscomp. Create a CSV report at ~/Documents/pgv_report.csv containing the Station and Amplitude for the resulting PGV values.
